translations.en: I’m buying six apples at the market.
translations.es: Estoy comprando seis manzanas en el mercado.
translations.de: Ich kaufe auf dem Markt sechs Äpfel.
translations.it: Sto comprando sei mele al mercato.
translations.ko: 시장에서 사과 여섯 개를 사고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在市场买六个苹果。
translations.ru: Я покупаю на рынке шесть яблок.
translations.pt: Estou comprando seis maçãs no mercado.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mua sáu quả táo ở chợ.
translations.ar: أنا أشتري ست تفاحات في السوق.
translations.nl: Ik koop zes appels op de markt.
translations.uk: Я купую на ринку шість яблук.
translations.hi: मैं बाज़ार में छह सेब खरीद रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg kjøper seks epler på markedet.
translations.id: Saya sedang membeli enam apel di pasar.
translations.sv: Jag köper sex äpplen på marknaden.
translations.da: Jeg køber seks æbler på markedet.
translations.ja: 市場でりんごを6個買っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun, elided before a vowel-initial verb; refers to the speaker.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of purchasing.
Cardinal numeral functioning as a quantifier modifying the plural noun 'pommes'.
Common count noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'achète', quantified by 'six'.
Preposition 'à' fused with the definite article 'le' ('à le' → 'au'); introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au', indicating location.

sentences.target: On dîne à six heures ce soir.

translations.fr: On dîne à six heures ce soir.
translations.en: We have dinner at six tonight.
translations.es: Cenamos a las seis esta noche.
translations.de: Wir essen heute Abend um sechs.
translations.ko: 오늘 저녁 여섯 시에 저녁 먹어요.
translations.pt: Jantamos às seis hoje à noite.
translations.he: אנחנו אוכלים ארוחת ערב בשש הערב.
translations.tr: Bu akşam saat altıda akşam yemeği yiyeceğiz.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi ăn tối lúc sáu giờ.
translations.nl: We eten vanavond om zes uur.
translations.hi: हम आज रात छह बजे रात का खाना खाएँगे.
translations.nb: Vi spiser middag klokka seks i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini kami makan malam pukul enam.
translations.sv: Vi äter middag klockan sex ikväll.
translations.da: Vi spiser middag klokken seks i aften.
translations.fi: Syömme illallista tänä iltana kello kuudelta.
translations.ja: 今夜は六時に夕食を食べます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; takes 3rd person singular verb, often meaning 'we' in colloquial French.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses the action of having dinner.
Preposition marking time; introduces the temporal complement 'six heures'.
Cardinal numeral specifying the number of hours; modifier of 'heures'.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the time expression 'six heures', complement of 'à'.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'soir' to form the temporal NP 'ce soir' ('this evening').
Common noun, masculine singular; head of 'ce soir', functioning as a temporal adjunct.

sentences.target: Ils sont six dans la petite voiture.
sentences.reading: /il sɔ̃ sis dɑ̃ la pətit vwatyʁ/

translations.fr: Ils sont six dans la petite voiture.
translations.ipa: /il sɔ̃ sis dɑ̃ la pətit vwatyʁ/
translations.en: There are six of them in the small car.
translations.es: Hay seis personas en el coche pequeño.
translations.de: In dem kleinen Auto sind sie zu sechst.
translations.it: Nella macchina piccola sono in sei.
translations.zh-Hans: 那辆小汽车里有六个人。
translations.yue: 嗰架細車入面有六個人。
translations.pt: No carro pequeno há seis pessoas.
translations.vi: Trong chiếc xe nhỏ có sáu người.
translations.ar: في السيارة الصغيرة يوجد ستة أشخاص.
translations.nl: In de kleine auto zitten ze met z’n zessen.
translations.hi: छोटी कार में छह लोग हैं.
translations.pl: W małym samochodzie jest ich sześć.
translations.el: Στο μικρό αυτοκίνητο είναι έξι άτομα.
translations.nb: I den lille bilen er de seks.
translations.id: Di mobil kecil ada enam orang.
translations.sv: I den lilla bilen är de sex.
translations.ro: În mașina mică sunt șase persoane.
translations.cs: V malém autě je jich šest.
translations.da: I den lille bil er de seks.

tokens.explanation: 3rd person masculine plural subject pronoun; subject of 'sont'.
Copular verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; links the subject to the predicate 'six'.
Cardinal numeral used as a predicate nominal indicating group size.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'voiture'.
Qualitative adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'voiture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

translations.vi: Bạn có thể lấy sáu bánh quy.
translations.hi: तुम छह बिस्कुट ले सकते हो.
translations.ja: クッキーを6枚取ってもいいです。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of the modal verb 'peux'.
Modal verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses ability or permission.
Infinitive complement of the modal 'peux'; denotes the action to be performed.
Cardinal numeral functioning as a quantifier modifying 'biscuits'.
Common count noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'prendre', quantified by 'six'.
